description: Crossplane etcd capacity planning dashboard for ROSA (OpenShift) clusters. Answers: (1) Is anything broken now? (2) When will we hit a limit? (3) Can I trust these forecasts?

options.content:
### How to Read This Dashboard

- **Row 1 — Current Health**: Red/yellow stat panels show *active symptoms*. If anything is red, investigate immediately.
- **Row 2 — Capacity Forecast**: Linear projections and days-to-breach stats tell you *when* you'll hit a limit. Act when days-to-breach drops below the threshold.
- **Row 3 — Model Accuracy**: Compares actual metrics against power-law predictions. Panels marked **ADVISORY** have low R-squared and should not drive decisions alone.
- **Row 4 — Capacity at Scale**: Fixed-point predictions at 50k and 100k objects — useful for node-sizing conversations.
- **Row 5 — Data Quality**: Confirms federation is alive and recording rules are producing data. If federation is DOWN, all predictions are stale.

panels.description:
Overall capacity status derived from symptom thresholds.
0 = GREEN (all clear), 1 = DEGRADED (warning threshold breached), 2 = CRITICAL (critical threshold breached).
panels.title: Overall Capacity Status

panels.description: Total etcd objects. Warn >30k, critical >80k.
panels.title: etcd Objects

panels.description: Working set. Warn >2 GiB, critical >4 GiB.
panels.title: Controller Memory

panels.description: P99 latency. Page if >500ms.
panels.title: etcd Latency

panels.description: P99 latency. Page if >2s.
panels.title: API Latency
When Will We Hit a Limit?

panels.description:
Linear projection of total etcd object count based on the 6-hour trend.

- 7-day projection: where the count will be in one week
- 30-day projection: where the count will be in one month

Horizontal threshold lines at 30k (warning) and 100k (critical) indicate capacity boundaries.
panels.title: Object Count Forecast (7d / 30d)

panels.description: Estimated days until 30,000 etcd objects. Act if <14 days.
panels.title: Days to 30k

panels.description: Estimated days until 100,000 etcd objects. Act if <30 days.
panels.title: Days to 100k

panels.description: Days until controller memory reaches 4 GiB critical threshold based on 6h growth trend. No data = stable or decreasing.
panels.title: Days to Memory Breach

panels.description: Days until API server P99 latency reaches 2s critical threshold based on 6h trend. No data = stable or decreasing.
panels.title: Days to API Breach

panels.description: R²=0.93 (HIGH confidence). Power-law model trained on 6.5k-48k objects.
panels.title: Memory: Actual vs Model

panels.description: R²=0.33 (LOW — advisory only). Burst-dominated, awaiting soak refit.
panels.title: etcd P99: Actual vs Model

panels.description: R²=0.52 (LOW — advisory only). Same caveat as etcd.
panels.title: API P99: Actual vs Model

panels.description: R²=0.76 (MEDIUM). Warning-level alerts only.
panels.title: CPU: Actual vs Model

panels.description: Percentage deviation of actual memory from model prediction. >30% triggers drift alert.
panels.title: Memory Drift %

panels.description: Percentage deviation of actual CPU from model prediction.
panels.title: CPU Drift %

panels.description: Percentage deviation of actual etcd P99 latency from model prediction. Advisory — low R².
panels.title: etcd Latency Drift %

panels.description: Percentage deviation of actual API P99 latency from model prediction. Advisory — low R².
panels.title: API Latency Drift %

panels.description: Model metadata and quality metrics. Models with low confidence are advisory only.
panels.title: Model Health & Confidence

panels.description: Predicted controller memory usage at 50,000 etcd objects based on capacity model.
panels.title: Memory at 50k Objects

panels.description: Predicted controller memory usage at 100,000 etcd objects based on capacity model.
panels.title: Memory at 100k Objects

panels.description: Predicted etcd P99 request latency at 50,000 etcd objects. ADVISORY — low model confidence.
panels.title: etcd P99 at 50k (ADVISORY)

panels.description: Predicted etcd P99 request latency at 100,000 etcd objects. ADVISORY — low model confidence.
panels.title: etcd P99 at 100k (ADVISORY)
How Many Nodes Do We Need?

panels.description: m5.xlarge worker nodes. Number of worker nodes required to support current etcd object count, based on power-law capacity model.
panels.title: Workers Required Now

panels.description: m5.xlarge worker nodes. Projected worker nodes required in 14 days based on current growth rate.
panels.title: Workers Required (14d)

panels.description: m5.xlarge worker nodes. Projected worker nodes required in 30 days based on current growth rate.
panels.title: Workers Required (30d)

panels.description: Maximum etcd objects the cluster can support before hitting a capacity threshold (memory, CPU, etcd latency, or API latency).
panels.title: Max Supported Objects

panels.description: Maximum Crossplane claims the cluster can support (max_objects / 8 for VMDeployment multiplier).
panels.title: Max Supported Claims

panels.description: Current capacity bottleneck: 1=Memory, 2=CPU, 3=etcd Latency, 4=API Latency.
panels.title: Bottleneck

panels.description: Is remote-write data arriving? 1 = healthy.
panels.title: Remote-Write Status

panels.description: Seconds since last remote-write sample. High values mean stale data.
panels.title: Data Staleness

panels.description: Number of active crossplane recording rule series. Should be >15 when all rules are producing data.
panels.title: Active Crossplane Series

panels.description: Total number of currently in-flight requests to the API server (mutating + read-only).
panels.title: Inflight Requests

panels.description: Total etcd object count over time. Watch for sustained upward trends.
panels.title: Object Count Over Time

panels.description: Breakdown of Crossplane-specific resource counts stored in etcd.
panels.title: Crossplane Resource Counts

panels.description: Object growth rate per hour.
panels.title: Object Growth Rate (per hour)

panels.description: Current object count with constant threshold lines at 30k and 100k.
panels.title: Capacity Timeline

panels.description: P99 API server request duration broken down by HTTP verb.
panels.title: Request Duration P99 by Verb

panels.description: Rate of API server requests per second, broken down by verb.
panels.title: Request Rate by Verb

panels.description: Rate of 5xx server errors from the API server.
panels.title: API Server 5xx Error Rate

panels.description: Number of requests currently being executed in the API Priority and Fairness subsystem.
panels.title: Flow Control Queue Depth

panels.description: Working set memory usage of containers in the crossplane-system namespace per pod.
panels.title: Controller Memory per-pod

panels.description: CPU usage rate of containers in the crossplane-system namespace per pod.
panels.title: Controller CPU per-pod

panels.description: Number of Crossplane managed resources stored in etcd, tracked via apiserver_storage_objects.
panels.title: Managed Resources

title: Crossplane Capacity Planning
